name: Surface
description: HTTP router and protocol adapters. Translates between network protocol (HTTP, CLI) and the record algebra. May call layers 00 and 01. No business logic — routing and serialisation only.
invariants: all routes return JSON with a top-level 'ok' or 'error' field
all authenticated routes require bearer token
no capability logic in routing layer
4xx for client errors, 5xx for server errors
